title: Indices and Surds
description: The laws of indices for integer, negative and fractional powers, and the algebra of surds: simplifying, combining, and rationalising denominators.
objectives: Apply the laws of indices, including a^0 = 1 and negative exponents, to simplify expressions
Evaluate and manipulate fractional (root) indices such as a^(1/n) and a^(m/n)
Simplify surds into the form k√n with n as small as possible
Add, subtract and multiply surd expressions, collecting like surds
Rationalise denominators with a single surd term and with (a + √b)-type binomial denominators using the conjugate
